2606.20388.title: DataMagic: Transforming Tabular Data into Data Insight Video
2606.20388.paper_summary: Data videos integrate dynamic charts, voice narration, and synchronized animations to communicate data insights as temporal narratives, making them an effective medium for improving data consumption efficiency in the data management lifecycle. However, producing high-quality data videos requires expertise spanning data analysis, narrative design, and video production. Existing approaches fall short: static visualization tools (e.g., BI dashboards) lack narrative logic and animation; authoring tools require users to pre-prepare visualizations rather than working from raw data; pixel-level video generation models cannot guarantee data fidelity or provenance. We demonstrate DataMagic, an end-to-end interactive system that transforms raw tabular data and natural language queries into narrative data-insight videos. To ensure data fidelity, DataMagic introduces the declarative specification DVSpec, which binds visual and animation elements to underlying data fields through data-driven semantic references. To address the combinatorial explosion of the design space, DataMagic adopts a Generate-then-Orchestrate multi-agent architecture that generates candidate scenes in parallel and then optimizes narrative coherence through global orchestration. Leveraging DVSpec's decoupling of logic and rendering, the system further supports three interaction modes and structured provenance-based data Q&A, transforming one-way videos into explorable interactive data interfaces. Evaluation on 109 real-world samples validates the effectiveness of the DataMagic. Homepage: https://datamagic-home.github.io/
2606.20388.paper_summary_zh: 數據視頻整合了動態圖表、語音旁白和同步動畫，以時間敘事的方式傳達數據洞察，使其成為提高數據管理生命周期中數據消耗效率的有效媒介。 然而，製作高質量的數據視頻需要跨越數據分析、敘事設計和視頻製作的專業知識。 現有的方法存在不足：靜態可視化工具（例如，BI 儀表板）缺乏敘事邏輯和動畫；創作工具要求用戶預先準備可視化，而不是從原始數據開始；像素級視頻生成模型無法保證數據的真實性或來源。 我們展示了 DataMagic，一個端到端的互動系統，將原始表格數據和自然語言查詢轉換為敘事數據洞察視頻。 為了確保數據的真實性，DataMagic 引入了聲明性規範 DVSpec，通過數據驅動的語義引用將視覺和動畫元素綁定到基礎數據字段。 為了解決設計空間的組合爆炸，DataMagic 採用了生成-然後-協調的多代理架構，並行生成候選場景，然後通過全局協調優化敘事一致性。 利用 DVSpec 對邏輯和渲染的解耦，該系統進一步支持三種互動模式和基於結構來源的數據問答，將單向視頻轉變為可探索的互動數據界面。 在 109 個真實樣本上的評估驗證了 DataMagic 的有效性。 首頁：https://datamagic-home.github.io/
2606.20388.author: Yupeng Xie et.al.
2606.20388.authors: Yupeng Xie, Chen Ma, Zhenyang Wang, Liangwei Wang, Jiayi Zhu, Chuxuan Zeng, Zhouan Shen, Boyan Li, Yuyu Luo
